headline: Top 50 High-Quality Dividend Growth Stocks For April 2026
summary: I track a universe of 50 high-quality dividend growth stocks to identify attractive entry points based on updated valuations and forward return estimates.

headline: Cantor Fitzgerald Raises Price Target for KLA Corp. (KLAC)
summary: KLA Corp. (NASDAQ:KLAC) is one of the 10 best AI chip stocks to buy according to hedge funds. On March 30, Cantor Fitzgerald increased the price target on KLA Corp. (NASDAQ:KLAC) from $1,850 to $2,000. The firm maintained an Overweight rating on the stock, which now yields an adjusted upside potential of almost 32% at […]
